Automate your armies with intuitive cont.message: Automate your armies with intuitive controls and features, allowing you to create and manage massive armies and production lines with ease across multiple fronts on multiple planets at once!

Galactic War is a twist on traditional r.message: Galactic War is a twist on traditional real-time strategy campaigns that has players battling across a dynamic galaxy filled with procedurally-generated content. Every playthrough is different.

Please exit the game, find it in your St.message: Please exit the game, find it in your Steam library, right click it, select Properties, and make sure that "Enable the Steam Overlay while in-game" is checked. After doing so, start the game and try again.
